title: SEC goes after crypto giants, Sequoia splits, LIV/PGA, Messi's deal + LIVE Q&A!
description:
(0:00) Bestie intros!

(1:48) Why RFK Jr. is resonating

(7:52) US crypto crackdown: action against Binance & Coinbase

(26:08) Sequoia splits off its China and India/SE Asia businesses

(41:55) PGA merges with LIV, Lionel Messi's revolutionary deal with the MLS, Apple, and Adidas

(56:16) Ukraine update, Tucker on Twitter

(1:02:20) LIVE Q&A from Angel Summit in Napa!

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses the SEC's actions against Binance and Coinbase, Sequoia's split of its China and India/SE Asia businesses, the PGA's merger with LIV, and Lionel Messi's deal with the MLS. The hosts also provide a Ukraine update and participate in a live Q&A session. The episode covers various topics, including crypto regulation, venture capital, and sports.

takeaways.text: SEC takes action against Binance and Coinbase
Sequoia splits off its China and India/SE Asia businesses
Lionel Messi's deal with the MLS includes revenue from Apple TV
Live Q&A session from Angel Summit in Napa
Crypto industry is at war with SEC Chair Gary Gensler
US regulators are a choke point for crypto and blockchain

sentiment.notes: The hosts discuss the SEC's actions against Binance and Coinbase, and the crypto industry's war with SEC Chair Gary Gensler, indicating a cautious tone. The episode also covers various other topics, including sports and venture capital.

notable_moments.description: Discussion of SEC's actions against Binance and Coinbase
Sequoia's split of its China and India/SE Asia businesses
PGA's merger with LIV and Lionel Messi's deal with the MLS
Live Q&A session from Angel Summit in Napa
